description: Cover letter hooks by niche — injected into L1 of the cover letter generator

chatbot.label: AI Chatbot / Customer Support
hooks: I noticed you need the bot to handle {detail_from_brief}. I shipped a similar Telegram bot for a news agency — it runs 7 articles/day fully autonomously.
The {feature_from_brief} you described is exactly what my own Telegram bot does in production — 100+ messages/day, zero manual input.

n8n_automation.label: n8n / Workflow Automation
hooks: Your {process_from_brief} workflow sounds like it needs exactly {technical_detail}. I've built 50+ production n8n workflows including a full lead pipeline.
I've automated exactly this kind of {process_from_brief} before — the last one cut 40 hours/week of manual work down to zero.

telegram_whatsapp.label: Telegram / WhatsApp Bot
hooks: The {feature_from_brief} you described is exactly what I built last month. My own Telegram bot handles 50+ modules in production.
I've built a Telegram bot running 24/7 on a dedicated server — {feature_from_brief} is a feature I've already shipped.

lead_generation.label: Lead Generation / Scraping
hooks: I see you need {detail_from_brief} — I've built the exact same pipeline. Delivered 300 qualified leads in 2 weeks, fully automated with n8n.
Getting {detail_from_brief} is one of my most common builds — last one ran for 3 months straight without a single manual intervention.

api_integration.label: API Integration / Make.com
hooks: Connecting {api_a} to {api_b} with {condition_from_brief} is one of my most common builds. I've integrated 12+ APIs in production.
I've built this exact kind of {integration_type} integration — clean architecture, error handling, and monitoring included.

rag_knowledge.label: RAG / Knowledge Base / AI Search
hooks: I run a production RAG system with hybrid search — ONNX embeddings + BM25 + knowledge graph. Your {use_case} is a direct fit.
Building {use_case} with RAG is exactly what I do daily — my own system processes thousands of documents with 95%+ retrieval accuracy.

generic.label: Generic (fallback)
hooks: {detail_from_brief} — I've built something very similar for {client_type}. Shipped in {timeframe}, still running in production.
I noticed {detail_from_brief}. I've solved this exact problem before — here's how I'd approach yours.
